app.title: Adult Media Manager
settings.title: Settings
scan.placeholder: Enter folder path or drag & drop…
scan.skip_organized_hint: Incremental rescan — hide files AMM has already organized
empty.all_organized_subtitle: Every media file in {path} is already organized. Uncheck “Skip organized” to see them all.
scan.stopped_banner_sub: Not all files in the folder were scanned. Unscanned files won't be matched or available for manual editing — run the scan again to process them.
template.same_as_source: Output matches the original path — no change
home.empty_subtitle: Select a folder and click Scan to detect media files
home.welcome_subtitle: Scan a folder to get started organizing your adult media collection.
empty.scan_subtitle: Nothing to organize in {path}. Check the path, or enable Recursive to include subfolders.
empty.scan_stopped_subtitle: No files were scanned before the scan was stopped.
empty.scan_error_subtitle: {error} — check the path exists and that you have permission to read it, then scan again.
empty.match_subtitle: Try switching the Source to StashDB, clean up the filenames, or edit metadata manually on each file below.
status.done_remaining: Done. {count} file(s) still need manual editing.
embed.interrupted: The server restarted while embedding metadata. NFO sidecars were already saved; re-run the embed for any files that need it.
status.browse_select_required: Please select at least one file or switch to folder mode
error.save_timeout: Error saving metadata: Request timed out — the file may be too large or the server is busy. Try again.
error.save_network: Error saving metadata: Could not reach the server. Check that the container is running and try again.
match.select_high_hint: Tick only the high-confidence matches so you can rename them in one pass
match.review_hint: Needs review = matched but medium/low confidence or sparse evidence — check these before renaming
match.filter_empty_subtitle: No matches fall into this view. Switch the filter back to All to see everything.
match.cached_hint: Reused from a previous match — no re-query. Tick Re-match to refresh.
match.confirmed_hint: You confirmed this match before (edited or renamed it).
match.rematch_hint: Ignore saved matches and re-query the database
match.based_on_hint: Confidence reflects agreement among the metadata that was available to compare
confirm.title: Confirm
preview_modal.title: Preview — paths that will change
modal.browse_kbd_hint: Tip: click checkboxes, or use ↑/↓ to move · Space to toggle · Shift+↑/↓ or Shift+Click for a range · Ctrl+A to select all
history.reverted_ok: Reverted — file restored to its original location.
history.revert_source_exists: Can't revert: a file already exists at the original location.
history.revert_forbidden: Can't revert: path is outside an allowed directory.
history.revert_note: Revert restores a moved file or removes a created copy/link. Embedded metadata and NFO sidecars are not removed.
manual.saved_embedding: Saved — embedding into the file in the background…
manual.stashdb_need_url: Paste a StashDB scene URL or ID first.
manual.tpdb_need_url: Paste a ThePornDB scene URL first.
resume.banner_msg: A previous rename was interrupted — {count} file{plural} still in queue ({action}).
match.remove_hint: Hide this file from the app (does not delete it from disk)
library.title: Library
settings.metadata_mode_hint: Sets how metadata is saved when you rename or save. "Remux" (default) rewrites the container with the tags embedded and writes a .nfo sidecar — works for every format. "Both" edits tags in place (faster, remux fallback) + .nfo. Persisted across restarts.
app.subtitle: Scan, match & rename your media
welcome.title: Welcome to AMM
welcome.subtitle: Scan a folder to get started organizing your media collection.
actionbar.ready: Ready — scan a folder, then Match to look up metadata.
settings.update_available_docker: Update available: v{version} — run: docker compose pull && docker compose up -d
settings.update_installed: v{version} is installed on disk — restart to finish the update
settings.update_installed_ok_msg: Restart the app to finish the update.
match.lookup_error_auth: Lookup failed: API key rejected — result unknown, check Settings
match.lookup_error_rate_limit: Lookup failed: rate limited — result unknown, retry later
match.lookup_error_network: Lookup failed: network error — result unknown, retry
match.lookup_error_internal: Lookup failed: internal error — result unknown
manual.description_placeholder: Scene synopsis — filled automatically by Fetch, or write your own
library.resolve_hardlink: Replace others with hardlinks (reclaims space, paths keep working)
library.resolve_not_same_fs: Files are on different filesystems — hardlinks are impossible there. Use Delete, or move the files first.
settings.performer_order_hint: Applies to {performer} and {performers} in names, the match cards and the NFO actor order. Performers whose gender the source doesn't state keep their position — use the ◀ ▶ arrows on a match card to reorder a single file by hand.
update.check_unreachable: Couldn't reach GitHub — check your connection. Automatic checks keep retrying.
update.check_throttled: Just checked — try again in a few seconds.
update.checks_disabled: Update checks are disabled by the administrator (AMM_UPDATE_CHECK=0).
update.verified_sub: sha256 checksum matches the GitHub release
update.appimage_note: Replaced in place — no password needed.
update.pkexec_note: Your system will ask for your password — the package manager does the actual install.
update.installing_sub: Waiting for your authorization, then the package manager installs the update. Nothing runs as root inside AMM.
update.done_sub: Restart AMM to start using it. Your files, history and settings are untouched.
update.manual_appimage: It is already executable — double-click to run the new version.
update.manual_saved: Saved {name} to your Downloads folder (opened in your file manager).
update.error_file_kept: The verified package is in your Downloads folder ({name}) if you prefer to install it yourself.
update.auth_cancelled: Authorization was cancelled — nothing was changed.
update.banner_sub_native: verified download · installs without a terminal
update.restart_body_spawn: The new version starts instantly — this window closes and v{version} opens in its place.
update.restart_body_relaunch: v{version} is ready to go — this window is still running v{running}.
update.restart_fine: Restarting only reopens AMM. Your files, history and settings are untouched.
settings.key_remove_confirm: Remove the saved {label} key? Matching via {label} will stop until a new key is added.
scan.from_folder_hint: Site/title inferred from the folder name
rename.preview_collisions: {n} file(s) wanted an existing name — auto-numbered
rename.preview_truncated: {n} name(s) shortened to fit the 255-byte filesystem limit
scan.include_hidden_hint: Scan dot-files and dot-folders too (off = they are skipped and counted)
scan.organized_hint: — NFO sidecar found, excluded from matching by default
scan.all_have_nfo: All scanned files already have NFO sidecars.
rename.skips_exact: {n} file(s) are already named exactly as the selected template would produce — nothing to rename.
rename.skip_advice: Choose a different template to give them a new name. For example:
rename.template_empty_error: Template error: destination filename is empty — edit the template before renaming.
rename.already_at_dest_note: Note: sampled files appear to already be at the correct destination.
embed.long_running: Still embedding — large files can take a while. Progress updates every 30 s.
library.clear_cache_confirm: Clear the match cache? All UNCONFIRMED cached matches are removed and will be re-queried on the next match. Confirmed matches are kept.
library.clear_thumbs_confirm: Delete all extracted preview thumbnails? Match rows lose their stored preview image until re-extracted; matching itself is unaffected.
settings.contribute_fp: Contribute fingerprints to StashDB (sends data to an external service)
settings.contribute_fp_hint: ⚠ Off by default. When enabled, confirming a StashDB match UPLOADS that file's content hashes (OSHash/pHash) and duration to stashdb.org under your StashDB account — improving fingerprint matching for everyone. No file names, paths, or other personal data are ever sent.
settings.tools_missing: Missing tools: {tools} — duration probing, thumbnails and embedding need them
